$schema_notes._comment: Phase0 table triage selection JSONL row contract. Step 0 selection gate output before PaddleOCR parser smoke.
$schema_notes.identity: The artifact is a JSONL manifest where each row records one triage decision for one PPT-extracted image candidate.
$schema_notes.path_rule: All path examples below are repo-root relative paths unless explicitly marked absolute.

source_image_id.description: Stable image candidate identifier for one PPT-extracted image.

source_image_path.description: Repo-root relative path to the original PPT-extracted image.

source_slide_numbers.description: Slide provenance if known. May be an empty array when the current evidence surface does not resolve slide numbers yet.

selection_decision.description: Exactly one triage decision per candidate.

selected_surface_path.description: Repo-root relative path to the image surface promoted for parser smoke. Must equal the original image path for use_full_image, a reviewed crop path for use_reviewed_crop, and null for excluded cases.

selection_rationale.description: Short evidence-backed explanation for the decision.

worker_id.description: Coordinator or triage worker identifier that produced the decision.

audit_required.description: True when the case must be manually reviewed before parser smoke promotion.

source_provenance.description: Optional PPT job or dataset provenance string.

evidence_refs.description: Optional paths to smoke evidence, OCR evidence, or review notes used to justify the decision.

cross_field_rules.description: If selection_decision is use_full_image, selected_surface_path must equal source_image_path.
If selection_decision is use_reviewed_crop, selected_surface_path must be a reviewed crop path and must not be null.
If selection_decision is not_a_table_candidate, selected_surface_path must be null and audit_required should normally be false.
If selection_decision is needs_manual_audit, audit_required must be true.

success_gate: Every seed candidate receives exactly one output row.
At least 1 and at most 2 rows are promoted into the parser smoke set through use_full_image or use_reviewed_crop.
No reviewed crop may be promoted without an explicit evidence-backed rationale.
No output row may silently drop provenance.
forbidden_states: Dropping a seed candidate without an output row.
Promoting an automatic crop that was not explicitly reviewed.
Producing more than 2 parser smoke candidates in this bounded phase0 gate.
